cases.name: enum_where_test-1
cases.sql: CREATE TYPE status AS ENUM ('pending', 'active', 'inactive', 'deleted')

cases.name: enum_where_test-2
cases.sql: CREATE TABLE items (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, status status)

cases.name: enum_where_test-3
cases.sql: INSERT INTO items (id, name, status) VALUES (1, 'Item 1', 'active')

cases.name: enum_where_test-4
cases.sql: INSERT INTO items (id, name, status) VALUES (2, 'Item 2', 'pending')

cases.name: enum_where_test-5
cases.sql: INSERT INTO items (id, name, status) VALUES (3, 'Item 3', 'inactive')

cases.name: enum_where_test-6
cases.sql: INSERT INTO items (id, name, status) VALUES (4, 'Item 4', 'deleted')

cases.name: enum_where_test-7
cases.sql: SELECT id, name, status FROM items WHERE status = 'active'

cases.name: enum_where_test-8
cases.sql: SELECT id, name, status FROM items WHERE status != 'deleted'

cases.name: enum_where_test-9
cases.sql: CREATE TYPE priority AS ENUM ('low', 'medium', 'high', 'critical')

cases.name: enum_where_test-10
cases.sql: CREATE TABLE tasks (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, title TEXT, priority priority)

cases.name: enum_where_test-11
cases.sql: INSERT INTO tasks VALUES (1, 'Task 1', 'low'), (2, 'Task 2', 'high'), (3, 'Task 3', 'critical'), (4, 'Task 4', 'medium')

cases.name: enum_where_test-12
cases.sql: SELECT id, title, priority FROM tasks WHERE priority IN ('high', 'critical') ORDER BY id

cases.name: enum_where_test-13
cases.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM tasks WHERE priority NOT IN ('low')

cases.name: enum_where_test-14
cases.sql: CREATE TYPE severity AS ENUM ('info', 'warning', 'error', 'fatal')

cases.name: enum_where_test-15
cases.sql: CREATE TABLE logs (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, message TEXT, severity severity)

cases.name: enum_where_test-16
cases.sql: INSERT INTO logs VALUES (1, 'Info message', 'info'), (2, 'Warning message', 'warning'), (3, 'Error message', 'error'), (4, 'Fatal message', 'fatal')

cases.name: enum_where_test-17
cases.sql: SELECT id, severity FROM logs WHERE severity = 'error' OR severity = 'fatal' ORDER BY id

cases.name: enum_where_test-18
cases.sql: CREATE TYPE state AS ENUM ('draft', 'published', 'archived')

cases.name: enum_where_test-19
cases.sql: CREATE TABLE posts (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, title TEXT, state state)

cases.name: enum_where_test-20
cases.sql: INSERT INTO posts VALUES (1, 'Post 1', 'published'), (2, 'Post 2', NULL), (3, 'Post 3', 'draft'), (4, 'Post 4', NULL)

cases.name: enum_where_test-21
cases.sql: SELECT id FROM posts WHERE state IS NULL ORDER BY id

cases.name: enum_where_test-22
cases.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM posts WHERE state IS NOT NULL

cases.name: enum_cast_extended_test-1
cases.sql: CREATE TYPE status AS ENUM ('active', 'inactive', 'pending')

cases.name: enum_cast_extended_test-3
cases.sql: INSERT INTO items (id, name, status) VALUES ($1, $2, $3::status)

cases.name: enum_cast_extended_test-4
cases.sql: SELECT $1::status as casted

cases.name: enum_cast_extended_test-6
cases.sql: CREATE TYPE priority AS ENUM ('low', 'medium', 'high')

cases.name: enum_cast_extended_test-7
cases.sql:
WITH priorities AS (
            SELECT 'high'::priority as p
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 'low'::priority
        )
        SELECT * FROM priorities

cases.name: enum_type_oid_test-1
cases.sql: CREATE TYPE mood AS ENUM ('happy', 'sad', 'neutral')

cases.name: enum_type_oid_test-2
cases.sql: CREATE TABLE people (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, mood mood)

cases.name: enum_type_oid_test-3
cases.sql: INSERT INTO people (id, name, mood) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 'happy')

cases.name: enum_type_oid_test-4
cases.sql: SELECT oid::text FROM pg_class WHERE relname = 'people'

cases.name: enum_type_oid_test-5
cases.sql: SELECT attrelid::text, attname, atttypid::text, attnum FROM pg_attribute LIMIT 20

cases.name: enum_type_oid_test-6
cases.sql: SELECT id, name, mood FROM people WHERE id = 1

cases.name: enum_type_oid_test-8
cases.sql: CREATE TABLE tasks (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, status status)

cases.name: enum_type_oid_test-9
cases.sql: INSERT INTO tasks (id, status) VALUES ($1, $2)

cases.name: enum_type_oid_test-10
cases.sql: SELECT id, status::text FROM tasks WHERE id = 1

cases.name: enum_cast_test-3
cases.sql: INSERT INTO items (id, name, status) VALUES (1, 'Item 1', 'active'::status)

cases.name: enum_cast_test-4
cases.sql: SELECT 'pending'::status as casted_status

cases.name: enum_cast_test-5
cases.sql: SELECT CAST('inactive' AS status) as casted_status

cases.name: enum_cast_test-8
cases.sql: INSERT INTO tasks VALUES (1, 'Task 1', 'high'), (2, 'Task 2', 'low')

cases.name: enum_cast_test-9
cases.sql: SELECT id, priority::text as priority_text FROM tasks ORDER BY id

cases.name: enum_cast_test-10
cases.sql: CREATE TYPE color AS ENUM ('red', 'green', 'blue')

cases.name: enum_cast_test-11
cases.sql: CREATE TABLE items (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, color color)

cases.name: enum_cast_test-12
cases.sql: INSERT INTO items (id, color) VALUES (1, 'yellow'::color)

cases.name: enum_cast_test-13
cases.sql: SELECT 'purple'::color as invalid_color

cases.name: enum_cast_test-14
cases.sql: SELECT * FROM items WHERE color = 'purple'::color

cases.name: enum_cast_test-17
cases.sql: INSERT INTO posts VALUES (1, 'Post 1', 'published'), (2, 'Post 2', 'draft'), (3, 'Post 3', 'published')

cases.name: enum_cast_test-18
cases.sql: SELECT id, title FROM posts WHERE state = 'published'::state ORDER BY id

cases.name: enum_cast_test-20
cases.sql: SELECT 'I am ' || 'happy'::mood::text as message

cases.name: enum_cast_test-21
cases.sql: SELECT UPPER('sad'::mood::text) as upper_mood

cases.sql: CREATE TABLE tasks (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, status status)

cases.name: enum_simple_test-3
cases.sql: INSERT INTO tasks (id, name, status) VALUES (1, 'Task 1', 'active')

cases.name: enum_simple_test-4
cases.sql: SELECT id, name, status FROM tasks ORDER BY id

cases.sql: CREATE TABLE items (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, priority priority)

cases.sql: INSERT INTO items (id, priority) VALUES (1, 'high')

cases.name: enum_error_handling_test-2
cases.sql: CREATE TABLE person (name TEXT, current_mood mood)

cases.name: enum_error_handling_test-3
cases.sql: INSERT INTO person (name, current_mood) VALUES ('Alice', 'angry')

cases.name: enum_error_handling_test-4
cases.sql: DROP TYPE nonexistent_type

cases.name: enum_error_handling_test-6
cases.sql: CREATE TABLE items (id INTEGER, item_status status)

cases.name: enum_error_handling_test-7
cases.sql: DROP TYPE status

cases.name: enum_error_handling_test-8
cases.sql: DROP TYPE status CASCADE

cases.name: enum_error_handling_test-9
cases.sql: ALTER TYPE nonexistent ADD VALUE 'new_value'

cases.name: enum_error_handling_test-10
cases.sql: DROP TYPE IF EXISTS nonexistent_type

cases.name: enum_error_handling_test-11
cases.sql: CREATE TYPE test_type AS ENUM ('a', 'b')

cases.name: enum_error_handling_test-12
cases.sql: DROP TYPE IF EXISTS test_type
